title: China's Zhongji Innolight sees shares surge after Hong Kong listing approval
summary_full: The deal size will exceed Luxshare Precision's $3.1 billion IPO earlier this month, making it the largest listing in Hong Kong this ​year.
summary_public: The deal size will exceed Luxshare Precision's $3.1 billion IPO earlier this month, making it the largest listing in Hong Kong this ​year.
